name: hover
description: Connect Hover to Claude Code: read-only access to your drone fleet.

hover_api_key.title: Hover API key
hover_api_key.description: Your Hover API key (starts with hk_). Create a read-only, org-scoped key at https://dash.hoverfeed.com/api-keys. Stored locally by Claude Code; sent only to mcp.hoverfeed.com.
